reset_desc: All progress will be permanently deleted!
warning_panel: You can't go back before the map is finished!
air_warning: Where Are You Going Without Turning Off Airplane Mode?
extra_hints: We're not solving quantum physics. Press that huge button and go through the opened door. If you want a clue even in this, we will be hurt a lot in the future...
Sometimes in life there is no going back... Just like in this episode. Forget about reverse gear, handle the button and move on.
Move your focus higher, the exit is taking shape somewhere there.
The only intelligence we have is this little piece of map. Study carefully this section that shows you where you should jump. The rest of the map is entirely up to your reflexes and memorization.

This route in front of you is not your only reality, it is just the first option you focus on. Don't pause when gravity bends... Your acceleration should already be taking shape in the void as you change direction.
Signals from the real world lock the door to this room. The solution is not on stage... Cut off all communication with the outside and remind your device how to fly.
To reach the exit, you first need to get that green key. Climb up and grab the key, then all you have to do is come to the door and the key will open the door for you.

This key doesn't like to give in easily. When he runs away from you, don't think you've made a mistake and give up; he's playing a little game of chase and seek with you. Keep following his trail, eventually he'll get tired and give up.

Jumping all the way back and going down from there to pass through obstacles is just one of the ways offered to you. Choose your own risk, but remember: If you want to survive, you have to make that double jump with perfect timing, not randomly.
The blind has surrendered to the darkness, the mute to tranquility... It is up to you to complete the trilogy to open the passage. Reset all echoes and embrace deafness in this scene.

Constant jumping exhausts the body; every step you take on the plain brings you lower. The only way to recharge your strength is to fall from top to bottom. The small gap next to the door? It's just left for you to reach the door effortlessly.
This is where the keys rule. Sometimes you need to take fate directly into your own hands instead of relying on intermediaries.
